project.project_title: Algorithmic Active Measures - data poisoning as counterintelligence tradecraft in AI-mediated intelligence analysis
project.source_strategy: Use sources to connect counterintelligence tradecraft, active measures, data poisoning, analytic deception, and human-AI review burden. The proof must show actor objective, poisoned evidence pathway, analytic uptake or rejection, and bounded warning.
project.distinctiveness_component_operation: Translate a counterintelligence active-measures pattern into an AI-mediated evidence-corruption scenario, then show analytic uptake, human review, and bounded warning.
project.distinctiveness_component_output: Actor objective, poisoned evidence pathway, analytic deformation, human correction or failure, and final warning boundary.
project.acceptance_test: A reviewer can see why this project could not be swapped with another page without losing the mechanism.
project.best_improvement: Make the public-safe bridge from tradecraft to data poisoning explicit enough that the study's distinctive mechanism is visible.
project.build_status: source-backed proof build; needs source-to-output capture and close-read strengthening
